description:
Experience Premium Sound Freedom

Elevate your audio daily with these advanced wireless earbuds. Designed for the discerning listener, they deliver an immersive, crystal-clear experience with the convenience of a sleek magnetic case and intelligent touch controls. Perfect for music, calls, and entertainment on the move.

Engineered for Performance & Clarity

  • True Wireless Freedom: Latest Bluetooth 5.3 ensures a rock-solid, extended-range connection up to 30 meters with minimal power drain.
  • Signature Sound Profile: Custom-tuned 8mm biological diaphragm drivers reproduce rich bass and crisp highs for a truly balanced audio signature.
  • Smart Separate Pairing: Use each earbud independently with different devices or together for powerful stereo, offering unmatched versatility.
  • Intuitive Fingerprint Touch: Lightweight touch panels allow you to effortlessly play/pause, skip tracks, answer calls, and activate voice assistant.

Complete Package Contents

  • TWS Earbuds (Pair)
  • Premium Magnetic Charging Case
  • USB Type-C Charging Cable
  • User Manual

Common Questions Answered

Q: How is the call quality on these?
A: Excellent. The built-in microphone uses advanced CVC 8.0 noise reduction technology, which filters out ambient background noise so your voice comes through clearly on calls.

Q: Can you really use one earbud at a time?
A: Absolutely. A key feature is independent pairing. You can use the left, right, or both together, making them perfect for all-day wear, work calls, or sharing audio.

Q: What's the actual battery life?
A: The earbuds offer several hours of continuous play per charge. The compact case provides multiple full recharges, delivering a combined 180 hours of standby power to keep you going for weeks.

Q: Is the case durable?
A: Yes. The magnetic hatch cover is designed for smooth, satisfying one-handed operation and snaps securely shut to protect your earbuds. It's built for daily use.

Shop With Confidence

Fast shipping, secure packaging, and a satisfaction guarantee. Enjoy ergonomic comfort and reliable wireless performance backed by trusted quality.
